departments.name: Company
departments.description: Company profile, mission, vision, values, and organizational structure
departments.promptGuidance: Generate structural frameworks and templates for company identity documents. Focus on organizational clarity, brand alignment, and cultural definition. Do not invent actual company names or values.

departments.name: Operations
departments.description: Operational procedures, workflows, and standard operating guidelines
departments.promptGuidance: Generate operational procedure frameworks and workflow structures. Focus on clarity, step sequencing, role assignment, and measurable outcomes. Do not generate specific company procedures.

departments.name: Sales
departments.description: Sales processes, pipelines, offers, and customer acquisition frameworks
departments.promptGuidance: Generate sales process frameworks, offer structures, and pipeline definitions. Focus on methodology, conversion optimization, and customer value delivery. Do not generate actual pricing or product details.

departments.name: Marketing
departments.description: Marketing campaigns, brand guidelines, persona definitions, and content strategy
departments.promptGuidance: Generate marketing framework structures, campaign templates, and persona definitions. Focus on audience segmentation, channel strategy, and measurement frameworks. Do not generate actual creative content or copy.

departments.name: Support
departments.description: Customer support procedures, escalation paths, and resolution workflows
departments.promptGuidance: Generate customer support workflow frameworks and escalation structures. Focus on response standards, resolution paths, and service level definitions. Do not generate specific product support scripts.

departments.name: FAQ
departments.description: Frequently asked questions schema and answer template structure
departments.promptGuidance: Generate FAQ category structures and question template frameworks. Focus on common inquiry categories, answer structure, and cross-referencing. Generate category headers and question patterns — not actual answers.

departments.name: Templates
departments.promptGuidance: Generate communication template structures with variable placeholders. Focus on {{variable}} syntax, channel-appropriate formatting, and merge field definitions. Use placeholder variables — no actual message content.

departments.name: Prompts
departments.description: AI prompt structures, system instructions, and prompt engineering guidelines
departments.promptGuidance: Generate AI prompt structure definitions with variable schemas, model parameters, and output format specifications. Focus on prompt architecture, variable definitions, and guardrails — not actual prompt content.

departments.name: Policies
departments.description: Business policies, compliance requirements, and regulatory guidelines
departments.promptGuidance: Generate policy document frameworks and compliance structure templates. Focus on policy scope, enforcement mechanisms, and regulatory alignment. Do not generate actual policy text or legal content.

departments.name: Playbooks
departments.description: Step-by-step operational playbooks and decision trees
departments.promptGuidance: Generate operational playbook frameworks with step sequences, decision points, and role assignments. Focus on trigger conditions, action steps, and escalation paths — using the playbook schema structure.

departments.name: Training
departments.description: Staff training materials, onboarding guides, and skill development resources
departments.promptGuidance: Generate training module structures, competency frameworks, and onboarding plan templates. Focus on learning objectives, assessment structures, and skill progressions — not actual training content.

departments.name: Automation
departments.description: Workflow automation specifications, trigger definitions, and action mappings
departments.promptGuidance: Generate automation workflow specifications with trigger conditions, action sequences, and integration mappings. Focus on event definitions, conditional logic, and system integration points — using the automation schema structure.

departments.name: Analytics
departments.description: KPI definitions, reporting structures, and performance metric frameworks
departments.promptGuidance: Generate KPI definition structures, measurement frameworks, and dashboard specifications. Focus on metric formulas, target definitions, data sources, and reporting cadence — using the kpi schema structure.
